_comment: Repo-wide Claude Code settings. Operators with custom local setups should override hook commands via .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if [[ "$cmd" == git\ commit* ]]; then echo "[eduflow hook] control-plane-smoke.sh skipped on shared checkout — set up local hook in .claude/settings.local.json to enforce" >&2; fi; } 2>/dev/null || exit 0
